DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta` is the core workspace CLI for creating, inspecting, editing, comparing, and maintaining modeled metadata.
Bulk insert instances from tsv/csv input. Use --auto-id only for new rows whose source data does not carry an external Id.
Generate numeric Id only for input rows that omit Id and are being created.
Insert one instance by explicit Id or auto-generated numeric Id. Use --auto-id only when creating a brand-new row with no external identity.
Generate next numeric Id from existing instances for a new row when no external Id exists.
Diff/merge instances and apply instance updates.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta instance relationship set Measure 1 --to Cube 2

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Inspect and edit model entities, properties, and relationships.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model add-property Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown

DocumentationSubject.Summary: View entity schema or one instance.
Deploy generated artifacts to external targets.
Input directory containing generated SQL scripts.
Environment variable name that contains the target SQL Server connection string.
Optional database to create/use before deployment.
Export workspace data to external formats.
C# only. Emit optional tooling helpers in <Model>.Tooling.cs.
Import from SQL into a new workspace, or import CSV into new/existing workspace.
Required for sql; optional for csv (mutually exclusive with --workspace).
Use existing workspace for csv import.
Show workspace summary and model/instance sizes.
Rename the model contract and instance root element.
Atomically rename an entity, update relationship targets, and rename implied non-role relationship fields.
Drop an entity (blocked if instances or inbound relationships exist).
Backfill existing rows (required for required properties when entity already has rows).

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model add-property Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Change whether a property is required; use --default-value to backfill existing rows when making a property required.
Backfill existing missing/blank rows when switching to required; only valid with --required true.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model set-property-required Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown
meta model set-property-required Cube Purpose --required false

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Rename a property in one entity.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model rename-property Cube Purpose Description

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Drop a property from an entity.
Rename a relationship usage by setting or clearing its role; instance relationship field names are rewritten atomically.
Set a new relationship role (usage column becomes <Role>Id). Omit --role to clear the role and revert usage naming to <TargetEntity>Id.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model rename-relationship System SystemType --role PrimarySystemType

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Add a required relationship; use --default-id to backfill existing source instances.
Required when source entity already has rows; must exist in target entity.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.WarehouseId --target Warehouse --lookup Id

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Atomically convert a scalar source property to a required relationship using a target lookup key. Source property is dropped by default; use --preserve-property only when the source property name will not collide with the implied relationship usage name.
Required source scalar property to rewrite.
Required lookup key property on target entity.
Keep the source scalar property. This is only valid when the source property name does not collide with the implied relationship usage name.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.WarehouseId --target Warehouse --lookup Id
meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.ProductId --target Product --lookup Id --role ProductRef --preserve-property

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Atomically convert a required relationship back to a required scalar Id property.
Required source entity that owns the relationship.
Required target entity referenced by the relationship.
Optional relationship role when multiple edges target the same entity.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model refactor relationship-to-property --source Order --target Warehouse
meta model refactor relationship-to-property --source Order --target Product --role ProductRef --property ProductId

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Drop a declared relationship (blocked if in use).

Read-only relationship inference from model + instance data. Strong suggestions require one exact eligible Id-based target; weak suggestions cover role-style suffix matches and other ambiguous multi-target cases.
Print copy/paste refactor commands for eligible relationship suggestions.
